samples.text: Plants need light to grow. Is this expected based on common sense?
Plants require light in order to grow. Does this match everyday common sense?
Vegetation needs illumination to develop. Is this expected based on common sense?
Growth needs energy from light. Plants use light, so they need it to grow. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
Plants need light to grow. The weather today is cloudy. Is this expected based on common sense?
